AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.title: Oracle: Inspiration
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.description: Generate a derived card from the prefix, middle, and suffix settings. You can switch to AI mode in mod config.
AICARDMOD-AI_CARD.upgraded_description: Generate a derived card from the prefix, middle, and suffix settings. You can switch to AI mode in mod config.
AICARDMOD-UI_DIALOG.title: Oracle: Wish
AICARDMOD-UI_DIALOG.instructions:
What effect do you want? (e.g. 80[gold]Block[/gold], draw 3 cards, 2 Strength)
AI will understand your request and generate a card effect.
AICARDMOD-STRIKE_CARD.title: Strike
AICARDMOD-DEFEND_CARD.title: Defend
AICARDMOD-PRAYER_CARD.title: Prayer
AICARDMOD-HOLY_LIGHT_STRIKE_CARD.title: Holy Light Strike
AICARDMOD-HUMILITY_CARD.title: Humility
AICARDMOD-HUMILITY_CARD.description: Discard {Cards:diff()} card from your hand. Gain {AICARDMOD-FaithGain:diff()} Faith.
AICARDMOD-HUMILITY_CARD.upgraded_descrip: Discard {Cards:diff()} card from your hand. Gain {AICARDMOD-FaithGain:diff()} Faith.
AICARDMOD-ADMONITION_CARD.title: Admonition
AICARDMOD-BAPTISM_CARD.title: Baptism
AICARDMOD-BLINDING_LIGHT_CARD.title: Blinding Light
AICARDMOD-BLINDING_LIGHT_CARD.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {AICARDMOD-MisstepGain:diff()} Misstep to the enemy.
AICARDMOD-BLINDING_LIGHT_CARD.upgraded_d: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {AICARDMOD-MisstepGain:diff()} Misstep to the enemy.
AICARDMOD-CHASTISEMENT_CARD.title: Chastisement
AICARDMOD-CHASTISEMENT_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy intends to attack, hit twice.
AICARDMOD-CHASTISEMENT_CARD.upgraded_des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy intends to attack, hit twice.
AICARDMOD-CONFESSIONAL_CARD.title: Confessional
AICARDMOD-CONFESSIONAL_CARD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Exhaust all Status and Curse cards; draw {Cards:diff()} cards and gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation for each exhausted this way.
AICARDMOD-CONFESSIONAL_CARD.upgraded_des: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Exhaust all Status and Curse cards; draw {Cards:diff()} cards and gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation for each exhausted this way.
AICARDMOD-DISCIPLINE_CARD.title: Discipline
AICARDMOD-DISCIPLINE_CARD.description: The next Attack you play this turn deals {AICARDMOD-TemporaryStrengthPower:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-DISCIPLINE_CARD.upgraded_descr: The next Attack you play this turn deals {AICARDMOD-TemporaryStrengthPower:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-GUIDING_LAMP_CARD.title: Guiding Lamp
AICARDMOD-HYMN_LEAD_CARD.title: Hymn Lead
AICARDMOD-IGNITE_INSPIRATION_CARD.title: Ignite Inspiration
AICARDMOD-IGNITE_INSPIRATION_CARD.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For every {AICARDMOD-RevelationStep:diff()} Revelation, deal {BonusPerThree:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-IGNITE_INSPIRATION_CARD.upgrad: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For every {AICARDMOD-RevelationStep:diff()} Revelation, deal {BonusPerThree:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-LIGHT_ARC_CARD.title: Light Arc
AICARDMOD-LIGHT_ARC_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If you have at least {AICARDMOD-LightArcFaithSpend:diff()} Faith, spend {AICARDMOD-LightArcFaithSpend:diff()} Faith to deal {BonusDamage:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-LIGHT_ARC_CARD.upgraded_descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If you have at least {AICARDMOD-LightArcFaithSpend:diff()} Faith, spend {AICARDMOD-LightArcFaithSpend:diff()} Faith to deal {BonusDamage:diff()} more damage.
AICARDMOD-MEDITATION_CARD.title: Meditation
AICARDMOD-MEDITATION_CARD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. At the start of next turn, draw {DrawNextTurn:diff()} extra cards.
AICARDMOD-MEDITATION_CARD.upgraded_descr: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. At the start of next turn, draw {DrawNextTurn:diff()} extra cards.
AICARDMOD-OFFERING_CARD.title: Offering
AICARDMOD-OFFERING_CARD.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}. At the start of next turn, draw {Cards:inverseDiff()} fewer cards.
AICARDMOD-OFFERING_CARD.upgraded_descrip: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}. At the start of next turn, draw {Cards:inverseDiff()} fewer cards.
AICARDMOD-PILGRIMAGE_ROAD_CARD.title: Pilgrimage Road
AICARDMOD-PILGRIMAGE_ROAD_CARD.descripti: At the start of next turn, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation and {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
AICARDMOD-PILGRIMAGE_ROAD_CARD.upgraded_: At the start of next turn, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation and {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)}.
AICARDMOD-RADIANT_BURST_CARD.title: Radiant Burst
AICARDMOD-RADIANT_MARK_CARD.title: Radiant Mark
AICARDMOD-RESONANCE_BURST_CARD.title: Resonance Burst
AICARDMOD-RESONANCE_BURST_CARD.descripti: Fire the arrows immediately, then keep {AICARDMOD-RetainPercent:diff()}% of the Revelation after resolution.
AICARDMOD-RESONANCE_BURST_CARD.upgraded_: Fire the arrows immediately, then keep {AICARDMOD-RetainPercent:diff()}% of the Revelation after resolution.
AICARDMOD-PENANCE_CARD.title: Penance
AICARDMOD-RELIC_BOX_CARD.title: Relic Box
AICARDMOD-RELIC_BOX_CARD.description: At the end of the turn, gain {AICARDMOD-FaithGain:diff()} Faith.
AICARDMOD-RELIC_BOX_CARD.upgraded_descri: At the end of the turn, gain {AICARDMOD-FaithGain:diff()} Faith.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_LIGHT_CARD.title: Revelation Light
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_LIGHT_CARD.descript: At the start of the turn, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_LIGHT_CARD.upgraded: At the start of the turn, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation.
AICARDMOD-LAW_STRIKE_CARD.title: Law Strike
AICARDMOD-LAW_STRIKE_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add {Cards:diff()} Prayer cards to your hand.
AICARDMOD-LAW_STRIKE_CARD.upgraded_descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Randomly add {Cards:diff()} Prayer cards to your hand.
AICARDMOD-SAINT_STRIDE_CARD.title: Saint Stride
AICARDMOD-SAINT_STRIDE_CARD.description: For each card you play this turn, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationPerCard:diff()} Revelation.
AICARDMOD-SAINT_STRIDE_CARD.upgraded_des: For each card you play this turn, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationPerCard:diff()} Revelation.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_FLOOD_CARD.title: Revelation Flood
AICARDMOD-HEAVENLY_SOUND_CARD.title: Heavenly Sound
AICARDMOD-HEAVENLY_SOUND_CARD.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation for each enemy hit.
AICARDMOD-HEAVENLY_SOUND_CARD.upgraded_d: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation for each enemy hit.
AICARDMOD-TRUTH_WORD_CARD.title: Truth Word
AICARDMOD-TRUTH_WORD_CARD.description: When used, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationPerCard:diff()} Revelation for each card in your hand.
AICARDMOD-TRUTH_WORD_CARD.upgraded_descr: When used, gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationPerCard:diff()} Revelation for each card in your hand.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_ECHO_CARD.title: Revelation Echo
AICARDMOD-HOLY_MIGHT_CARD.title: Holy Might

AICARDMOD-DOOMSDAY_JUDGMENT_CARD.descrip: Whenever Revelation triggers this turn, subsequent Revelation damage increases by {Damage:diff()}.
AICARDMOD-DOOMSDAY_JUDGMENT_CARD.upgrade: Whenever Revelation triggers this turn, subsequent Revelation damage increases by {Damage:diff()}.
AICARDMOD-DEVOUT_GUARDIAN_CARD.title: Devout Guardian
AICARDMOD-DEVOUT_GUARDIAN_CARD.descripti: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If you have Faith, gain {AICARDMOD-FaithBonusBlock:diff()} more Block.
AICARDMOD-DEVOUT_GUARDIAN_CARD.upgraded_: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If you have Faith, gain {AICARDMOD-FaithBonusBlock:diff()} more Block.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_SWORD_CARD.title: Revelation Sword
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_SWORD_CARD.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain Revelation equal to the damage dealt.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_SWORD_CARD.upgraded: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain Revelation equal to the damage dealt.
AICARDMOD-CAUSALITY_CARD.title: Causality
AICARDMOD-CAUSALITY_CARD.description: For the rest of this turn, whenever that enemy takes damage, it takes {Damage:diff()} additional damage.
AICARDMOD-CAUSALITY_CARD.upgraded_descri: For the rest of this turn, whenever that enemy takes damage, it takes {Damage:diff()} additional damage.
AICARDMOD-BLIND_RADIANCE_CARD.title: Blind Radiance
AICARDMOD-BLIND_RADIANCE_CARD.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies and apply {AICARDMOD-MisstepGain:diff()} Misstep.
AICARDMOD-BLIND_RADIANCE_CARD.upgraded_d: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies and apply {AICARDMOD-MisstepGain:diff()} Misstep.
AICARDMOD-PUNISHMENT_CARD.title: Punishment
AICARDMOD-PUNISHMENT_CARD.description: If the enemy has Misstep, apply {AICARDMOD-MisstepGain:diff()} Misstep.
AICARDMOD-PUNISHMENT_CARD.upgraded_descr: If the enemy has Misstep, apply {AICARDMOD-MisstepGain:diff()} Misstep.
AICARDMOD-ECHO_SMITE_CARD.title: Echo Smite
AICARDMOD-ECHO_SMITE_CARD.description: Deal damage equal to your current total Revelation.
AICARDMOD-ECHO_SMITE_CARD.upgraded_descr: Deal damage equal to your current total Revelation.
AICARDMOD-SECULARIZATION_CARD.title: Secularization
AICARDMOD-SECULARIZATION_CARD.descriptio: Lose up to {AICARDMOD-SecularizationCap:diff()} Faith. Gain {AICARDMOD-StrengthPerFaith:diff()} Strength for each point lost.
AICARDMOD-SECULARIZATION_CARD.upgraded_d: Lose up to {AICARDMOD-SecularizationCap:diff()} Faith. Gain {AICARDMOD-StrengthPerFaith:diff()} Strength for each point lost.
AICARDMOD-PRAISE_POEM_CARD.title: Praise Poem
AICARDMOD-PRAISE_POEM_CARD.description: Add {Cards:diff()} Prayer cards to your hand.
AICARDMOD-PRAISE_POEM_CARD.upgraded_desc: Add {Cards:diff()} Prayer cards to your hand.
AICARDMOD-HERETICAL_RITUAL_CARD.title: Heretical Ritual
AICARDMOD-HERETICAL_RITUAL_CARD.descript: Lose all Faith. Gain {AICARDMOD-EnergyPerThreshold:diff()} for every {AICARDMOD-FaithPerEnergy:diff()} Faith.
AICARDMOD-HERETICAL_RITUAL_CARD.upgraded: Lose all Faith. Gain {AICARDMOD-EnergyPerThreshold:diff()} for every {AICARDMOD-FaithPerEnergy:diff()} Faith.
AICARDMOD-TRINITY_CARD.title: Trinity
AICARDMOD-TRINITY_CARD.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation. Gain {AICARDMOD-FaithGain:diff()} Faith.
AICARDMOD-TRINITY_CARD.upgraded_descript: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation. Gain {AICARDMOD-FaithGain:diff()} Faith.
AICARDMOD-FAITH_SHIELD_CARD.title: Faith Shield
AICARDMOD-FAITH_SHIELD_CARD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. For every {AICARDMOD-FaithUnit:diff()} Faith, gain {AICARDMOD-BlockPerFaith:diff()} more Block.
AICARDMOD-FAITH_SHIELD_CARD.upgraded_des: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. For every {AICARDMOD-FaithUnit:diff()} Faith, gain {AICARDMOD-BlockPerFaith:diff()} more Block.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_WATER_BLESSING_CARD.title: Holy Water Blessing
AICARDMOD-HOLY_WATER_BLESSING_CARD.descr: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Spend up to {AICARDMOD-MaxPietySpend:diff()} Faith; for each point spent, draw {AICARDMOD-DrawPerFaith:diff()} additional cards.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_WATER_BLESSING_CARD.upgra: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Spend up to {AICARDMOD-MaxPietySpend:diff()} Faith; for each point spent, draw {AICARDMOD-DrawPerFaith:diff()} additional cards.

AICARDMOD-PURIFICATION_HAMMER_CARD.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Remove all Misstep from the target enemy, and deal {AICARDMOD-BonusPerMisstep:diff()} additional damage for each stack removed.
AICARDMOD-PURIFICATION_HAMMER_CARD.upgra: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Remove all Misstep from the target enemy, and deal {AICARDMOD-BonusPerMisstep:diff()} additional damage for each stack removed.
AICARDMOD-ENLIGHTENMENT_CARD.title: Enlightenment
AICARDMOD-ENLIGHTENMENT_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each Prayer card in your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold], damage increases by {AICARDMOD-BonusPerPrayer:diff()}.
AICARDMOD-ENLIGHTENMENT_CARD.upgraded_de: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each Prayer card in your [gold]exhaust pile[/gold], damage increases by {AICARDMOD-BonusPerPrayer:diff()}.

AICARDMOD-SAINT_HAMMER_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If Revelation is greater than {AICARDMOD-RevelationThreshold:diff()}, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

AICARDMOD-SMITE_EVIL_CARD.title: Smite Evil
AICARDMOD-SMITE_EVIL_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy has Misstep, hit {Repeat:diff()} times.
AICARDMOD-SMITE_EVIL_CARD.upgraded_descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy has Misstep, hit {Repeat:diff()} times.

AICARDMOD-CHAIN_REVELATION_CARD.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times. Gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation per hit.
AICARDMOD-CHAIN_REVELATION_CARD.upgraded: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times. Gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation per hit.
AICARDMOD-ECHO_HYMN_CARD.title: Echo Hymn
AICARDMOD-ECHO_HYMN_CARD.description: After Revelation resolves, keep {AICARDMOD-RetainPercent:diff()}% of the points.
AICARDMOD-ECHO_HYMN_CARD.upgraded_descri: After Revelation resolves, keep {AICARDMOD-RetainPercent:diff()}% of the points.

AICARDMOD-APOCALYPSE_OMEN_CARD.descripti: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Play the drawn cards that have Revelation.
AICARDMOD-APOCALYPSE_OMEN_CARD.upgraded_: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Play the drawn cards that have Revelation.

AICARDMOD-SOUL_FOCUS_CARD.description: Revelation triggered this turn prioritizes the chosen enemy.
AICARDMOD-SOUL_FOCUS_CARD.upgraded_descr: Revelation triggered this turn prioritizes the chosen enemy.
AICARDMOD-BURNING_SCRIPTURE_CARD.title: Burning Scripture
AICARDMOD-BURNING_SCRIPTURE_CARD.descrip: Gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation. Randomly exhaust a card from your hand and add its cost to the Revelation gained this way.
AICARDMOD-BURNING_SCRIPTURE_CARD.upgrade: Gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation. Randomly exhaust a card from your hand and add its cost to the Revelation gained this way.
AICARDMOD-HERESY_TRIAL_CARD.title: Heresy Trial
AICARDMOD-HERESY_TRIAL_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal {AICARDMOD-BonusPerDebuff:diff()} additional damage for each debuff on that enemy.
AICARDMOD-HERESY_TRIAL_CARD.upgraded_des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal {AICARDMOD-BonusPerDebuff:diff()} additional damage for each debuff on that enemy.
AICARDMOD-LIGHT_CHAIN_CARD.title: Light Chain
AICARDMOD-LIGHT_CHAIN_CARD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. The enemy loses {AICARDMOD-StrengthLoss:diff()} Strength.
AICARDMOD-LIGHT_CHAIN_CARD.upgraded_desc: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. The enemy loses {AICARDMOD-StrengthLoss:diff()} Strength.

AICARDMOD-HOLY_WILL_CARD.description: The next Skill card you play this turn is played an additional time.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_WILL_CARD.upgraded_descri: The next Skill card you play this turn is played an additional time.
AICARDMOD-TELEPATHY_CARD.title: Telepathy
AICARDMOD-TELEPATHY_CARD.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] and put them on top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
AICARDMOD-TELEPATHY_CARD.upgraded_descri: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] and put them on top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold].

AICARDMOD-PURIFYING_FIRE_CARD.descriptio: Deal damage equal to your current Faith {Repeat:diff()} times.
AICARDMOD-PURIFYING_FIRE_CARD.upgraded_d: Deal damage equal to your current Faith {Repeat:diff()} times.

AICARDMOD-TITHE_CARD.upgraded_descriptio: At the end of combat, gain 10% of the [gold]gold[/gold] you have.
AICARDMOD-SILENT_PRAYER_CARD.title: Silent Prayer
AICARDMOD-SILENT_PRAYER_CARD.description: Gain {AICARDMOD-FaithGain:diff()} Faith. You cannot play Attack cards this turn.
AICARDMOD-SILENT_PRAYER_CARD.upgraded_de: Gain {AICARDMOD-FaithGain:diff()} Faith. You cannot play Attack cards this turn.

AICARDMOD-BLIND_FOLLOWING_CARD.title: Blind Following

AICARDMOD-CLEANSE_SIN_CARD.description: For this combat, whenever you lose 1 Faith, gain {AICARDMOD-BlockPerFaithLoss:diff()} Block.
AICARDMOD-CLEANSE_SIN_CARD.upgraded_desc: For this combat, whenever you lose 1 Faith, gain {AICARDMOD-BlockPerFaithLoss:diff()} Block.

AICARDMOD-SAINTESS_FORM_CARD.description: For every 7 Revelation triggers, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
AICARDMOD-SAINTESS_FORM_CARD.upgraded_de: For every 7 Revelation triggers, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
AICARDMOD-CELESTIAL_GATE_CARD.title: Celestial Gate
AICARDMOD-CELESTIAL_GATE_CARD.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times. Gain {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()} Revelation {Repeat:diff()} times.

AICARDMOD-HOLY_CHALICE_CARD.description: Whenever you gain Revelation, gain an additional {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()}.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_CHALICE_CARD.upgraded_des: Whenever you gain Revelation, gain an additional {AICARDMOD-RevelationGain:diff()}.
AICARDMOD-FINAL_REVELATION_CARD.title: Final Revelation
AICARDMOD-FINAL_REVELATION_CARD.descript: Double your current Revelation. You can no longer gain Revelation.
AICARDMOD-FINAL_REVELATION_CARD.upgraded: Double your current Revelation. You can no longer gain Revelation.
